common.title: Title
common.name: Name
common.sureToDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
common.diarySubtitle: Track income and expenses with a minimal CRUD workflow.
common.addEntrySubtitle: Create a new diary entry and save it through the CRUD API.
common.editEntrySubtitle: Update an existing diary entry and persist the changes through the CRUD API.
common.entryFormDescription: Fill in the movement information clearly so the diary stays easy to scan, filter and review over time.
common.entryMainDetailsHint: Set the type, amount, date and category of the movement.
common.entryNotesSectionHint: Use notes to remember why the movement happened or attach useful context.
common.amountHelper: Use a positive amount with two decimal precision.
common.dateHelper: Choose the day when the movement actually happened.
common.descriptionHelper: Write a short label that is easy to search later.
common.notesHelper: Optional notes can help you remember recurring or unusual movements.
common.entryFormTipText: Descriptions work best when they are short and specific, for example “April electricity bill” or “Client payment invoice 102”.
common.amountMustBePositive: Amount must be greater than zero
common.emptyEntriesText: Create your first income or expense to start tracking your daily balance.
common.emptyFilteredEntriesText: Try changing or clearing filters to see more results.
common.entriesLoadErrorTitle: We could not load the diary
common.entriesLoadErrorText: The request failed or the API is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
